subject: [PATCH v2 02/18] xfs: convert iomap ops to ->iomap_next()

2026-07-01.patch_summary: This patch converts the iomap operations for XFS to use the new ->iomap_next() callback, which is a more efficient and flexible way of handling I/O mappings. The conversion uses the iomap_process() helper function to finish previous mappings and produce the next one. This change does not introduce any functional changes and only updates the internal implementation details. The patch affects several files in the XFS codebase, including xfs_file.c and xfs_iomap.c.
